en: When reading it, you probably think that this word has four syllables and you might pronounce
ko: 읽으면 이 단어에 네 음절이 있다고 생각해서
ja: 読むと、この単語には4音節あると思うかもしれません。
zhTW: 閱讀時，你可能以為這個字有四個音節。
vi: Khi doc, ban co the nghi rang tu nay co bon am tiet.

en: it as comfortable or comfortable. However, when we pronounce this word it just has three syllables.
ko: comfortable 또는 comfortable이라고 발음할 수 있어.
ja: しかし、実際に発音するときは3音節しかありません。
zhTW: 然而，當我們發音時它只有三個音節。
vi: Tuy nhien, khi chung ta phat am tu nay, no chi co ba am tiet.

en: We would pronounce it as comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable.
vi: Chung ta se phat am la comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable. Comfortable.
